content.text: MCP Catalog backend development work in completed for AI Hub
Only one automation spike issue remains
Wrapped up code wise – signoffs in Deployment epic
In Signoffs – wrapping up some bugs
E2E is still progressing – might be a few days late – testing is ongoing & should make it
